attributes.action: The standing government answers a question rather than skirting them at PMQs
attributes.additional_details: Watching PMQs is an embarrassment to the standing UK government. I’d sooner see it cancelled rather than watching in sheer frustration.
attributes.background: Answer questions in PMQs rather than deflecting or skirting round the question. If you don’t know the answer commit to when you will come back with an answer.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
